Override.dn: Tattoo of the Kitava Blood Drinker

Overrides.Override: 0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects are instead Unexciting Limited to 1 Runegraft of Stability

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Alberon's Warpath Soldier Boots Armour: 382 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 24 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 75de7491e8583619a49938e91d30067ba3d773f9c0d5dbb61852d058a10d3c61 Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-B LevelReq: 49 Implicits: 0 18% increased Strength +219 to Armour +16% to Chaos Resistance 25% increased Movement Speed Cannot deal non-Chaos Damage Adds 1 to 80 Chaos Damage to Attacks per 80 Strength
